metadata.description: Marketplace for the survival-first Indian-equity decision-support kit.

plugins.name: small-trader
plugins.description: Survival-first, broker-agnostic Indian-equity decision-support kit (research/educational, advisory-only): read-only screening, research, portfolio evaluation, watchlist monitoring, and scheduled reviews across claude.ai surfaces; fail-closed, write-tool-denied. Not investment advice; not a SEBI-registered IA/RA; no warranty.
